description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 12th; Slot none; Price 12,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This stout, dense rod is always constructed of highly conductive metal, shot through with web-like veins of white or yellow glass. While a creature holds a conduit rod, she gains electricity resistance 5 as a constant effect as well as a +1 bonus to her effective caster level when casting any spell with the electricity descriptor. Once per day as a free action, when the wielder of a conduit rod casts a spell with the electricity descriptor, she can teleport anywhere that spellâs effect, but is otherwise unaffected by the spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, dimension door, lightning bolt, resist energy; Cost 6,000 gp
